context:
Abdul Kaium is an Associate Project Manager at Mediusware (Dhaka, Bangladesh), where he leads all marketing and growth projects. He manages a 7-member cross-functional team across content, design, and marketing operations. He oversees $5,000+ monthly Google PPC ad budgets, drives GTM strategy for B2B clients, manages acquisition and retention funnels, and runs Instagram campaign strategy. He's been in the content, SEO, and marketing space for 10+ years.

Career progression: 
- Freelance Content Writer (2016-2020)
- Copywriter at Harget LLC (2020-2023, Thailand Remote)
- Copywriter at Local Marketing Pros (2022-2023, Florida Remote)
- YouTube Content Strategist at Harget LLC (2023-2024)
- Content Specialist at Glamour Marketing Group (2024, California Remote)
- Business Analyst at Skydo (Nov 2024 – Jan 2025)
- Content Strategist at SkillersZone LLC (Feb-Jul 2025) – Amazon, Shopify, Etsy
- Content & Copywriting Specialist – Team Leader at Mediusware (Aug 2025 – present)
- Currently: Associate Project Manager at Mediusware (promoted, leading all marketing & growth projects)

Key tools: Google Analytics, Google Ads/PPC, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Klaviyo, Helium 10, Erank, ClickUp, Trello, Surfer SEO, Jasper, Copy.ai, Canva, Monday.com, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads.

Skills: GTM strategy, B2B lead generation, funnel optimization, campaign management, UX writing, SEO (technical + content), e-commerce strategy, AI implementation, prompt engineering, content systems, persuasive copywriting, team leadership, client management.

Education: BBA in Marketing at Presidency University Dhaka (part-time, 2025–2028, CGPA 3.87), B.Sc. IT at SBS Ludhiana India (2023-2024).

Certifications: AI in Marketing (Coursera/UVA), Advanced Content Marketing with Brian Dean (SEMrush), Content Marketing (HubSpot), Google Analytics.

Languages: Bengali (Native), English (Fluent, IELTS 6.5), French (A1), German (A1).

Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh. Contact: abdulkaiumatwork101@gmail.com, +880 1819-447446. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/akarnab.

Personality: Curious, friendly, strategic, loves learning, data-driven thinker with a storytelling heart. He is open to new opportunities, collaborations, and consulting engagements.
